paragraphs:
Birth of Christ, 9-6 B.C.
Public Life of Christ, 27-30 A.D.
Herod Agrippa I, 41-44
Apostolic Council of Jerusalem, 49/50
Jewish insurrection, 66-70
Jerusalem falls, and the temple is destroyed, 70

Stoning of Stephen, 36 A.D.
Conversion of Paul, 36
Martyrdom of James, 42
Paul's 1st missionary journey to Cyprus, Asia Minor, 45-49
Paul's 2d missionary journey to Galatia, Macedonia, Greece, 50-52
Paul's 3d missionary journey to Asia Minor, Macedonia, Greece, 53-58
Paul imprisoned for two years in Caesarea, 58-60
Roman captivity of Paul, two years, 61-63, followed by acquittal.
Martyrdom of James the Less, 62
Martyrdom of Peter, 64/67
Paul again arrested, 66
Martyrdom of Paul, 67
Death of John, c. 95-100

Administer Judea from 6-41 and 44-66 A.D.
Coponius, 6-9
Ambivius, 9-14
Ann. Rufus, 12-15
Val. Gratus, 15-26
Pon. Pilate, 26-36
Marcellus, 36-37
Marullus, 37-41
Cuspius Fadus, 44-46
Tib. Alexander ---48
Ventidius Cumanus, 48-52
Felix, 52-60
Festus, 60-62
Albinus, 62-64
Gessius Florus, 64-66

Augustus, 27 B.C.--14 A.D.
Tiberius, 14-37
Caligula, 37-41
Claudius, 41-54
Nero, 54-68
Vespasian, 69-79
